overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path through a lush green landscape. The character passes a stream, encounters an NPC at a crossroads, and continues past a thatched-roof hut into open grasslands under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path alongside a stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with a sword on his back, moving away from the rocky stream bank

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through grassy terrain
narrow waterway running parallel to the path with rocky banks
large rocky formation beside the stream
simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the path
dense forest of pine trees covering the distant hills

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path with a stream running parallel on the left and a wooden fence on the right. The landscape is open with moderate vegetation and distant pine forests under a partly cloudy morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: path intersection with fork leading uphill

events.description: Geralt slows and turns left at the fork in the path
passing the NPC villager standing at the crossroads

agents.ego_description: approaching the path fork and turning left to take the uphill route, passing close to the standing villager

notable_agents.action: villager woman in green dress standing at the path intersection, watching Geralt pass by

entered.detail: dirt path splitting into two directions
traditional wooden hut with straw roof visible on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches a fork in the road where a villager stands watching. He turns left onto the uphill path, leaving the stream behind, with a thatched hut now visible on the left hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill path approaching a thatched-roof homestead

events.description: passing the thatched-roof hut and wooden palisade fence
path curves right as Geralt continues past the homestead

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward the thatched hut, then passing alongside it and continuing past the wooden fence

entered.detail: rustic wooden stake fence surrounding the hut
tan canvas shelter pitched beside the path
tall white-barked tree near the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends the hill path toward the thatched-roof hut, passing by its wooden palisade fence and a canvas tent. The hut moves from left to right as he passes, and the path curves into more open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path with distant farm buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding path through open meadows toward distant farm structures

entered.detail: expansive open field with tall grass on both sides of the path
cluster of wooden farm structures visible on the horizon
isolated white-barked trees dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the winding dirt path through expansive open grasslands. The thatched homestead is left behind as the landscape opens up, revealing distant farm buildings and scattered birch trees under the wide morning sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from a riverside trail into expansive open grasslands. It begins with Geralt walking beside a parallel stream and a wooden fence under a partly cloudy morning sky. As he reaches a fork in the road and passes a watching villager, the camera follows him turning left and ascending an uphill path, leaving the water behind. The scene then shifts as he passes a thatched-roof hut and a canvas tent, with the homestead sliding from left to right as the path curves. Finally, the landscape opens up completely, leaving the buildings behind to reveal distant farm structures and scattered birch trees across a wide, rolling plain.
